title: Attention is all you need
summary: A layered, first-principles reading of the 2017 Transformer paper (Vaswani et al., arXiv:1706.03762), in the Crafting Interpreters voice: from the sequential bottleneck and word embeddings, through query/key/value attention, scaled dot-product, multi-head, and positional encoding, up to the full encoder-decoder architecture, why self-attention wins, the training recipe and BLEU results, and how this one paper became modern LLMs (GPT, BERT) — closing with a full acronym-and-term glossary.

images.prompt: A refined, modern flat-vector book-cover illustration on a light cool-ivory background: a single row of glowing circular word-nodes (like beads on a line) connected to one another by a delicate web of curved light beams of varying brightness, suggesting each word paying attention to the others. Use a violet, teal, and warm-amber accent palette on the beams, generous negative space, subtle dotted-grid texture. Elegant, luminous, scientific-poster feel; no text or lettering baked in. Target size ~1200x800px, 3:2 landscape; compose with the row of nodes centred and safe margins — the art is letterboxed into a 3:2 box, so keep nothing important near the edges.
images.alt: A sentence of glowing word-nodes joined by a web of attention beams, forming a luminous atlas
images.caption: Every word, looking at every other word at once — that is the whole idea.

images.prompt: A clean, modern flat-vector editorial illustration split into two side-by-side panels on a light cool-ivory background. Left panel: several stylized figures standing single-file on a conveyor-belt assembly line, each passing one small note to the next, with the last figure waiting — evoking waiting in line. Right panel: the same number of figures seated around a round table, every figure connected to every other by thin glowing lines, all conversing at once. Violet, teal, and amber accent palette, generous whitespace, no text baked into the image. Target size ~1280x720px, 16:9 landscape; compose with the two panels centred and safe margins — it is letterboxed into a 16:9 box, so keep nothing important near the edges.
images.alt: Left: workers on a single-file assembly line passing one note down the row. Right: the same workers around a round table all speaking at once.
images.caption: The RNN is a line where each worker waits for the one before; attention is a round table where everyone talks at once.
